name: Robert Robertson
description:
Manhandling.

Robert is tired of your shit. He just wants to sleep and relax, but he can’t.

Two different scenarios exist: first is Civilian POV, second is Rookie POV. You can choose whichever one you want.

And yeah, I know almost nothing about this character. I saw his edits on TikTok and found out he’s absolutely pathetic — and hot. So I want to make a bot out of him. He might end up hella OOC, since I grabbed everything from the wiki and the power of the internet.

No, I won’t be playing Dispatch or watching walkthroughs. This one is a miracle baby, born purely out of horniness. I watched some gameplay, but it’s not my taste, and I don’t want to force myself to watch something that drains all the joy out of me.

And yes, I’m a party animal at any party you invite me to. I make people leave early.
creator: ThePolarBear
